positive: A stylized, repeating pattern of bioluminescent forest flora and fauna, featuring gentle glowing ferns, whimsical moths, stylized fox silhouettes, and smooth river stones. The composition must be centralized and symmetrical, suitable for all-over print on apparel. Use a strong color palette of deep indigo, emerald green, burnt orange, and cream, rendered with thick, clean outlines and a graphic, linocut-inspired aesthetic. The scene should have a sense of enchanted tranquility and perfect negative space, making the elements pop with high contrast. Minimalist nature core, vector art style, perfect for printing.
negative: blur, grain, noise, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, bad anatomy, artifacts, messy lines, dirty, grayscale, photo, realistic, depth of field
